facility: University of Maryland Medical Center — Cardiology
indication: Risk-stratify acute pulmonary embolism (assess for right-heart strain).
findings: Normal left ventricular size and systolic function (EF 60%). NORMAL right ventricular size and systolic function — no dilation, no hypokinesis, no septal flattening. Normal estimated RV systolic pressure. No significant valvular disease. No pericardial effusion.
impression: No echocardiographic evidence of right-heart strain. Consistent with a LOW-RISK pulmonary embolism at this time. (Baseline for comparison with any future study.)
